currentStep.title: Rewrite the Final Factorization Cleanly
currentStep.openingLine: Your split-work is close; now let's turn it into one clean final factorization.
currentStep.firstTutorQuestion: Which factors should still remain in the final line?
currentStep.smallHint: Keep only prime factors in the last line, and make sure none were dropped.
currentStep.goodStoppingPoint: Learner writes one complete prime factorization with no missing or composite factor.

nextStep.title: Verification Bridge With 12
nextStep.openingLine: Let's check whether the answer is really prime factorization, not just a matching product.
nextStep.firstTutorQuestion: Before checking the product, are all the factors prime?
nextStep.smallHint: If one factor is composite, the answer is not finished yet.
nextStep.goodStoppingPoint: Learner rejects 2 x 6 because 6 is not prime and accepts 2 x 2 x 3.
